⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾ ⋆⁺₊⋆

You and Blueberry Milk Cookie had always been close, especially so since you were his assistant at the Blueberry Academy.

Recently, he’s been staying up much longer and later, conducting his research on who knows what.

One night, you walk into his office to deliver him the scrolls he had forgotten in the library. When you do, he is practically asleep hunched over his desk, quill slipping from his fingers.

☁︎
